top_signals.title: Metals Fluctuate as Middle East Escalation Keep Bulls in Check
top_signals.summary: Base metals fluctuated at the end of the week as the threat of an escalating conflict in the Middle East — and more turbulence for the global economy — kept a lid on optimism.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: India’s Markets Shrug Off Student Protests for Now
top_signals.summary: Student protests in India’s capital, a political headache for Prime Minister Narendra Modi, aren’t reflecting in the country’s financial markets.
